title: Webera siamensis
taxonomy: Webera siamensis belongs to the family Acanthaceae. This plant is a species of flowering plant, specifically a type of herbaceous perennial. It is native to Southeast Asia and is part of the Webera genus. Webera siamensis is known for its unique and delicate foliage. The plant's classification places it within the order Lamiales.

It is known for its potential in treating various health conditions, including fever, digestive issues, and infections.
